figures.caption: FIG. 3. µ dependence of χOZ for the Rashba metal for λ = 0.3 and (a) J = 0.1, (b) J = 0.3, and (c) J = 0.6. The unit of the vertical axis is |e|µB

FIG. 5. µ dependence of χOZ for the Rashba metal with λ = 0.3. The black dots represent the numerical result with kBT = 0.01 and the magenta line represent the result for kBT = 0 [Eq. (B13)]. The unit of the vertical axis is |e|µB
